productDisplayName: Nike Men's Dual Fusion White Shoe
description: Composition:Lightweight running shoes in white, with phylon midsole and Waffle outsole, single layer mesh upper and flex grooves in the frontWash Care:1. Brush surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washA perfect partner for your feet, these nike Dual Fusion shoes are a perfect combination of style and comfort. The single layer mesh upper enhances breathability and comfort, while the internal Fit system ensures an enhanced lockdown. The phylon midsole in these shoes has a dual density that cuts down weight and improves cushioning. While the EVA sockliner on the insole gives absolute underfoot comfort, the rubber outsole in waffle pattern adds durable traction.
